title: Postmortal Particles
description: Overhauls the totem of undying particle effect.
body:
# Postmortal Particles

### Overhauls the totem of undying particle effect.

Postmortal Particles adds many new particle effects whenever a totem of undying is activated. All particle effects(including the original) can be turned on/off via the config. This mod can also easily be disabled to return the effect back to the original effect via the config.

#### Particles Overview
Check out the Gallery to see all of the particles in action!  
If you'd like a more in depth view of the config, check out the Wiki!

## Dependencies

**Requires** Fabric API and YetAnotherConfigLib 2.1.1 or higher.  
Also requires Mod Menu if you wish to edit the config.

[![Requires Fabric API](https://i.imgur.com/OIHAigX.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
